g.text: without IO monad: side effects hidden in a pure-looking type
with IO monad: effects explicit in the return type
nothing in the type warns callers about side effects
IO in the type makes effects visible and their order guaranteed by bind

g.title: IO effect declared — callers know this touches the file system
IO effect declared — callers know this writes a log
